rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_DAC_READ_SEARCH)`. DAC read/search bypass = read any file. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Constant `CAP_DAC_READ_SEARCH` IS in _PRIVILEGED_CAP_CONSTANTS → verdict policy emits NOT_EXPLOITABLE.
